schema.name: OOVERT
schema.description: OOVERT is a brand strategy and identity studio. We name companies, position them, and design brand identities that get remembered and chosen.

hero.title: Camouflage is for prey.
hero.lede: OOVERT is a brand strategy and identity studio. We name companies, decide what they stand for, and design the brand that carries it. If your company looks and sounds like its competitors, that is the problem we solve.

premise.statement: Most branding is camouflage.
premise.body: Safe colours. Borrowed language. A logo built to upset no one, and forgotten by everyone. That is not branding. It is money spent to stay invisible, and companies pay it every month.
premise.counter: We build the opposite.
premise.pullLine: A clear brand is a business asset.
premise.pullNote: It shortens your sales cycle, protects your pricing when the market gets nervous, and gives customers a reason to choose you before they have even spoken to you.

manifesto.text: Visibility is economics. It starts with Strategy, the one true thing no competitor can copy, sharpened by Positioning until the market cannot look away. Then the Identity that carries it: a name, a mark, a voice recognised before it is read. Naming makes it travel. Rebranding wakes the companies the world stopped seeing. Camouflage is for prey. We build brands that refuse to hide.

practice.intro: We keep the offer short on purpose.

items.name: Brand strategy
items.desc: It starts with a few weeks of interviews, audits and honest questions. We are looking for the one true thing about your company that no competitor can copy. Everything else gets built on top of it.

items.name: Positioning
items.desc: One clear sentence about who you are for and why you are the obvious choice. If your nearest competitor could say the same line, you do not have a position yet.

items.name: Brand identity
items.desc: Name, logo, type, colour, voice and motion, built into one system people recognise before they finish reading it.

items.name: Guidelines and rollout
items.desc: The guidelines, templates and everyday tools your team needs to keep the brand sharp long after we hand it over.

practice.terms: Every engagement runs on senior people start to finish, so your brand is never handed to a B team.

packages.chapterNote: Professional branding in the US averages about $7,500. Ours start at $280.
packages.lead: World-class branding, a fraction of the cost.

onetime.note: Fixed scope, fixed price, delivered fast. One brief, one invoice, one launch.

cards.name: Basic
cards.desc: To get a real brand off the ground.

cards.name: Premium Branding
cards.desc: Everything you need to launch and grow.

monthly.note: Design on tap, month to month. Pause or cancel anytime, no lock-in.

cards.name: Solo
cards.desc: One active request at a time.

cards.name: Studio
cards.desc: Two active requests at a time.

cards.name: Scale
cards.desc: A dedicated squad for high volume.

staff.note: Our senior people, embedded in your team for as long as you need them.

cards.name: Dedicated Designer
cards.desc: One senior designer, full-time on your team.

cards.name: Design Pod
cards.desc: A small senior squad: design and strategy.

cards.name: Embedded Team
cards.desc: A full multi-disciplinary team on tap.

packages.guarantee: Money-back guarantee. If you are not thrilled with the work, we keep going until you are, or refund you.

evidence.note: We are putting the current results together for this page. Ask, and we will show you the numbers that matter in your category, with clients you can call.
evidence.linkLabel: See how we present a project

studio.statement: Senior hands only. Four disciplines. One question: would we sign it?

principles.text: We show you one direction, not three. Choosing is the hard part, and it is the part you are paying us for.
If something is not working, we say so in the room, not in the wrap-up email.
Good taste is not a line on the invoice. It is the reason to hire a studio like this one.
If the strategy cannot survive being explained in a hallway in one breath, it is not finished.

studio.where: A distributed studio across six timezones. We work wherever the project takes us.

contact.statement: Say it out loud.
contact.note: If you are serious about the work, tell us about the project and roughly what you plan to invest. We read everything that fits.
